subcodes.first_line: The Book from Him Who hath been wronged unto him who desireth to turn towards the Most Sublime Horizon and hearken unto the Call of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی اراد ان یتوجه الی الافق الاعلی و یسمع ندآء الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
